author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Result: Three issues fixed. (1) LinearFusedBackward GPU path — conditionally push grad_bias only when bias exists, matching CPU path. Also fixed same bug in Conv2dBackward, Conv1dBackward, ConvTranspose2dBackward. (2) batch_transpose — replaced CPU roundtrip with permute+contiguous, stays entirely on-device. (3) GELU erf backward — added gelu_backward_erf_f32 GPU kernel (Abramowitz-Stegun polynomial erf in PTX), eliminating GPU→CPU→GPU roundtrip for exact GELU mode. Full test suite: 3,254 passed, 0 failed.
